# Reporting Damage

An product that arrives damaged should be reported in under seventy-two hours of shipment through the support portal, with photographs of both the product and the outer packaging. Reporting in under the window qualifies the order for a free replacement or full reimbursement without the usual return delivery step.

[Source: damaged_items.md#reporting-damage]
